title: Department Manager Vacancy at Barista Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Barista Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Barista Global Group in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Barista Global Group:
Barista Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barista Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
